entries.rationale: 目标strengthening: 5份 funcReg(顶层Bku + count/clmul/crypto/blockCipher子单元)各9位, 两侧都锁存同一 fuOpType 副本; 各模块 result-mux 只读该寄存器的子集位, 未读位两侧 bug-for-bug 对称 cone-dead(top死0/1/4/6/7/8, count死3-8, crypto死非[4], clmul/cipher全宽只整字比较). 层次名(cryptoModule vs u_core/u_crypto)+叶名(funcReg vs func_reg)差异使 auto_match 失败, fm_pins.tcl 对5模块×9位逐位 set_user_match 双射配对. vmucp=true令FM实际比较这45个 matched-unread 点验证恒相等(同源同拍锁存); 非waiver/dont_verify/扩黑盒

assembly+vmucp+dead-ref: 4黑盒=ftb/ittage/tage/uftb(empty_blackbox端口桩, 对应305绿target FTB/ITTage/Tage_SC/FauFTB, depends_on); RAS/RASStack两侧elaborate白盒(非vendor纯逻辑, 非305 target); DelayN两侧elaborate; vmucp验15个对称matched-unread(各DelayN只读本预测器enable位, 其余enable位两侧bug-for-bug死, ref==impl双射自动配对); golden-only 602死ref(s1/s2/s3_pc_dup分段debug-PC流水寄存器, 只喂s2_pc_addr/s3_pc_addr无输出扇出=cone-dead, impl正确省略)=dead-ref → PASS_DEAD_REF
strict+vmucp: TLDebugModule/DTM两侧elaborate白盒(消2黑盒,codex_0034裁定)+FM_MERGE_DUP=false; 138对称死双射(SBA队列payload/CDC未读域); POC passing1749

assembly option-2: SRAM模板链(SplittedSRAM/SRAMTemplate/sram_array/array_N)两侧elaborate受验, 仅7个vendor宏array_14/15/16/17_ext + 独立绿target L2Directory(mbistPl实例, depends_on)保留黑盒边界; vmucp=true验证16个req_s2_wayMask对称死位
目标strengthening: 内部子模块对称死寄存器(golden子模块复用/镜像, ref与impl仅差u_core包装层级, 去前缀后同位置同名, auto_match_flattened_arrays签名双射配对), 两侧同源锁存cone-dead. vmucp=true令FM实际比较验证恒相等; 非waiver/dont_verify/扩黑盒

assembly(reviewer裁定选项2, 同ICacheDataArray): DCache 4副本 tag 阵列。TagArray/TagSRAMBank(rst_cnt逐组清零)/SRAMTemplate_114(holdRead/地址/mask/DFT连线)/sram_array/array_9 SRAM链 与 MbistPipeDcacheTag(纯逻辑MBIST流水) 全部两侧elaborate参与证明; 仅8个(4副本×2 TagSRAMBank)厂商存储宏 array_9_ext 作对称assembly黑盒边界(behavioral RAM ram[255:0], HARD_MACRO_BOUNDARY). native SUCCEEDED passing2450 failing/unverified/aborted/unread_ref/unread_impl/compare全0. vmucp=true: 令FM实际比较10个两侧同golden MbistPipeDcacheTag 的 matched-identical 死寄存器(mbistPl/addrReg_reg[8:0] 9bit写地址 + addrRdReg_reg[8] 读地址顶位; MBIST流水为9bit/512深共享模板但本SRAM仅256深/8bit addr, 顶位在SRAM边界截断→喂黑盒cone-dead; ref==impl路径全对称)验证恒相等. 非waiver/dont_verify/扩黑盒

assembly: ExeUnit glue(§0 in1ToN分发/§1 FU阵列/§2 ClockGate门控链/§3 单口仲裁)全证明(native passing2292, failing/unread/nc/compare全0). 3黑盒=Alu/Mul/Bku(三独立305 FU目标, 各SIGNOFF_PASS, depends_on绿child, unresolved_blackbox声明边界). ClockGate/ClockGate_1(时钟门控latch cell)+in1ToN(Dispatcher纯组合路由)非305目标, 均小规模非vendor逻辑→两侧elaborate白盒实比(golden ClockGate.sv/Dispatcher.sv进FM_REF_DEPS+WRAPPER_SRCS), 非黑盒吸收. 无dont_verify/无扩黑盒/allow只列3绿FU child
